OverallRiskScore.textColor:
{{(() => { const tableData = Table_RiskReg.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (
currentRow._scoreRaw >= 7
  ? "#ff4d4f"
  : currentRow._scoreRaw >= 4
  ? "#faad14"
  : "#52c41a"
)) : 
currentRow._scoreRaw >= 7
  ? "#ff4d4f"

  : "#52c41a"
 })()}}

RiskLevel.computedValue:
{{(() => { const tableData = Table_RiskReg.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (
currentRow.RiskLevel === "High"
  ? "🔴 HIGH"
  : currentRow.RiskLevel === "Medium"
  ? "🟠 MEDIUM"
  : "🟢 LOW"
)) : 
currentRow.RiskLevel === "High"
  ? "🔴 HIGH"
  : currentRow.RiskLevel === "Medium"
  ? "🟠 MEDIUM"
  : "🟢 LOW"
 })()}}
